mapper.select: SELECT id, target_year, annual_electricity_kwh, re100_target_ratio, growth_rate, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM annual_targets WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, target_year, annual_electricity_kwh, re100_target_ratio, growth_rate, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM annual_targets WHERE target_year = #{targetYear} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO annual_targets ( target_year, annual_electricity_kwh, re100_target_ratio, growth_rate, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{targetYear}, #{annualElectricityKwh}, #{re100TargetRatio}, #{growthRate}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE annual_targets SET annual_electricity_kwh = #{annualElectricityKwh}, re100_target_ratio = #{re100TargetRatio}, growth_rate = #{growthRate}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
